domain: sports equipment, gym/fitness hardware, rehabilitation exercise devices, and adjustable training mechanisms

ideas.idea_title: Adjustable Olympic Barbell Safety Catch Hook
ideas.product_context: Power rack attachment for catching a loaded barbell during squats or bench press
ideas.core_function: Locks into rack uprights at selectable heights and presents a reinforced curved catch surface for the bar
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined steel hook body with rack pin bore, radiused bar cradle, rear locating boss, and gusseted load path
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines large-radius contact geometry, offset load-bearing features, multiple coaxial holes, filleted transitions, and asymmetric reinforcement ribs

ideas.idea_title: Indexed Cable Machine Pulley Swivel Arm
ideas.product_context: Adjustable functional trainer used in gyms for cable exercises at different pull angles
ideas.core_function: Rotates a pulley housing through indexed angular positions while carrying cable tension
ideas.likely_main_part: Aluminum swivel yoke arm with pivot boss, detent holes on an arc, pulley axle supports, and cable clearance cutouts
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests curved hole patterns, forked yoke geometry, concentric pivot features, thin clearance slots, and load-bearing blends between bosses and arms

ideas.product_context: Physical therapy device for controlled ankle dorsiflexion and plantarflexion exercises
ideas.core_function: Supports the foot while connecting to adjustable resistance bands or a small torque mechanism
ideas.likely_main_part: Contoured pedal plate with heel cup, strap slots, pivot barrel, resistance anchor holes, and underside stiffening ribs
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires ergonomic curved surfaces, strap apertures, ribbed underside structure, hinge-axis alignment, and multiple anchor points with smooth edges

ideas.product_context: Adjustable weight bench mechanism for selecting backrest incline angles
ideas.core_function: Provides discrete locking positions for the bench support arm under user and weight load
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined sector plate with radial tooth pockets, central pivot bore, mounting holes, stop shoulder, and thickened perimeter
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests radial arrays, angular indexing features, variable-thickness profiles, precise pivot relationships, and stress-relief fillets around notches

ideas.product_context: Indoor rowing machine foot platform adjustable for different shoe sizes
ideas.core_function: Slides along a rail and locks the foot stretcher position while supporting strap and heel forces
ideas.likely_main_part: Sliding carriage block with rail groove, spring-pin locking holes, footplate mounting bosses, and strap clearance windows
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines linear guide geometry, repeated locking features, offset mounting bosses, rectangular through-windows, and tight functional clearances

ideas.product_context: Selectorized dumbbell handle that engages different weight plates based on dial position
ideas.core_function: Rotates to capture or release plate lugs in a programmed sequence
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical cam sleeve with stepped engagement lobes, center bore, detent groove, timing marks, and retaining-ring channels
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests nonuniform rotational profiles, stepped cam surfaces, concentric grooves, axial feature sequencing, and precise angular relationships

ideas.product_context: Folding treadmill deck support that allows controlled deck lift and locked storage position
ideas.core_function: Carries the pivot joint between the frame and running deck while providing hard stops for travel limits
ideas.likely_main_part: Forged or machined hinge block with twin clevis ears, large pivot bore, stop lugs, mounting slots, and relief pockets
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests clevis symmetry, high-load pivot bores, integrated stop geometry, elongated slots, pocketed mass reduction, and robust fillet networks

ideas.idea_title: Grip-Width Adjustable Lat Pulldown Handle Hub
ideas.product_context: Cable attachment handle with sliding grips for different shoulder widths and exercise variations
ideas.core_function: Locks two handle arms at selectable lateral positions while transferring cable load through a central eye
ideas.likely_main_part: Central hub block with cable eye boss, opposing dovetail tracks, locking pin holes, scale recesses, and end stops
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires dovetail or keyed sliding geometry, opposing mirrored features, load-centered eyelet modeling, repeated adjustment holes, and compact clearance details

ideas.idea_title: Continuous Passive Motion Knee Linkage Crank
ideas.product_context: Rehabilitation machine that gently cycles a patient's knee through a programmed range of motion
ideas.core_function: Converts motor rotation into adjustable reciprocating motion for a leg support linkage
ideas.likely_main_part: Eccentric crank disk with adjustable radial slot, drive shaft bore, linkage pin boss, counterweight pocket, and clamp split
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests eccentric geometry, radial slots, clamping splits, offset bosses, circular-pocket mass balancing, and motion-critical reference axes

ideas.product_context: Training sled used for sprint resistance and strength conditioning
ideas.core_function: Anchors a tow strap or harness line to the sled while allowing quick angle changes under high pulling loads
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined tow cleat with rounded strap horn, base bolt pattern, angled web reinforcement, rope groove, and wear-facing radii
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines organic strap-contact curves, angled reinforcement webs, bolt-hole patterns, groove surfaces, and thick-to-thin transitions under realistic load paths
